ID (HCID) and/or NPI associated with the CCW_PRSCRBR_ID may request the prescriber 
bridge file, which is designed for this purpose. 

For 2006–2013, this variable is the CCW-assigned prescriber identifier that is populated by linking the 
PRSCRBR_ID from the PDE to the proprietary HCIdea Prescriber Database. HCIdea has prescriber 
information from a variety of data sources, including the NPPES directory (the National Plan and 
Provider Enumeration System, which assigns a unique NPI to each
